updated: 2026-07-13 (health-fidelity round: stop the dashboard crying wolf; branch fix/health-fidelity off main; ADR-0007 source precedence + reconciliation, ADR-0008 applicability display state; per-pipe fidelity fixes, all pure-compute with node:test)

fidelity_round.name: health-fidelity-fixes
fidelity_round.foundation_item: issue 54 (read-only Shopify Admin API client + least-privilege credential; does not block NAV units)
fidelity_round.note: branch pushed; PRs not opened, not merged to main, per the kickoff

integration_round.name: health-fidelity-integration
integration_round.result: live re-grade: 5 of 6 pipes read correctly green/neutral (was zero green); inventory_sync freshness+liveness green, remaining amber is the amber-capped divergence; order layer 989 false reds down to 40 genuine aged stalls. Real NAV + real middleware + live Shopify.
integration_round.note: branch pushed; PRs not opened, not merged to main, per the kickoff

stack.decision: Option B: Node + TypeScript backend, React + TypeScript frontend

gates.devops_provisioning: clarified 2026-07-06 via docs/DATA_SOURCES.md: NAV is Azure SQL (sql-grus-prd-01, db sqldb-nav18-grus-prd-01), Entra auth (no passwords). Ask: grant the dashboard a read-only Entra identity (managed identity or service principal) with db_datareader. Local dev already works via az login. Middleware base URL (middleware.grundens.com, Cloudflare-fronted, dashboard.rs endpoints unauthenticated) still to confirm for reachability.
gates.ba_orphan_disambiguation: likely resolved, pending Mari: GRUS$Sales Header.WebOrder (tinyint) disambiguates (WebOrder=1 + empty WebId = orphan; WebOrder=0 = never orphan). Client wired to read WebOrder; ORDER_ORPHAN_GRADING_ENABLED stays off until Mari confirms, then it is a config flip.
gates.ba_nav_codeunit_schema: open: blocks any unit reading it; ship additively without that source
gates.ux_signoff: signed off on the Unit 1 reference panel (2026-07-06); panels replicate that template
gates.deploy_target: decided 2026-07-06: ADR-0005 accepted Alternative B (cloud VM + owned monitored VPN); CD pipeline built (Unit 10). Fallback A if the VPN cannot be made reliable.
gates.remaining_after_round: DevOps provisioning is the only open work: stand up the cloud VM, the owned VPN with line-of-sight to internal NAV + middleware, create the GitHub production environment with required reviewers, and set the DEPLOY_SSH_* + DATABASE_URL + MIDDLEWARE_* + NAV_* secrets. Then set AGGREGATOR_ENABLED=true to run against real sources. BA questions (orphan grading, NAV codeunit schema) remain open and are shipped additively.

phases.W: fan-out wave, independent subagents, after Unit 0

phases.P: provisioning realization (post-round): real read-only source clients against live systems, do not merge until validated
phases.HF-F: health-fidelity foundation (2026-07-13): reconciliation ADR, applicability ADR, config + shared, one commit
phases.HF-W: health-fidelity fan-out: per-pipe fidelity fixes, each pure-compute + node:test (healthy-green AND true-fault-fires)
phases.HF-R: health-fidelity research-first: order-layer 98.9% red investigation then fix
phases.HF-C: health-fidelity convergence: typecheck + test, round.json, push (no PRs)
phases.INT-F: integration foundation (2026-07-13): merge onto real middleware client, resolve, ADR housekeeping
phases.INT-W: integration fan-out: Shopify client + reconciliations, job-queue source fix
phases.INT-R: integration research-first: residual order red-rate verification then fix
phases.INT-C: integration convergence: typecheck + test, live end-to-end re-grade, push (no PRs)
